# tag: pain

total: 11

## #45456
- added: 2022-01-29 04:30:53

I can’t follow a routine. Not doing what’s planned. \n\nHesitant to make calls to matrimony matches.

---

## #45454
- added: 2022-01-29 04:27:41

I overestimate my ability, e.g while I was still recovering from tonsillectomy, did wall pushups, went to Nijigarh Tapang etc. Those acts of mine made me sick immediately. Even I thought of going to village, cancelled only by fever. \n\nAs soon as I feel little better sleep late. Afraid to stay still, keep listening audiobooks or watch short videos.

---
